---
title: "Using OpenStreetMap with R :: CHEAT SHEET"
author: 
  - name: Timothée Giraud
  - name: Louis Laurian
date: "2026-06-27"
categories: [OpenStreetMap]
image: "cheatsheet_osm_r_p1.png"
freeze: true
bibliography: references.bib
fig-cap-location: top
---

This [new cheat sheet](https://zenodo.org/records/20842874/files/cheatsheet_osm_r.pdf) guides users on how to use OpenStreetMap data and related tools with R for: geocoding, routing, downloading base maps and datasets.



[![](cheatsheet_osm_r_p1.png)](https://zenodo.org/records/20842874/files/cheatsheet_osm_r.pdf)


[![](cheatsheet_osm_r_p2.png)](https://zenodo.org/records/20842874/files/cheatsheet_osm_r.pdf)
